description: ## Component: hx-number-input (NEW) **Tier 1 — Universal Foundation | Industry Consensus: 5/6 libraries** Numeric input with increment/decrement stepper controls. Critical for healthcare dosage, quantity, and measurement entry. ### ADR-001 Classification: Hybrid (Form Component) Properties control min/max/step validation. Slots for label/help/error. ### API Design **Properties:** - `name`, `value` (number), `required`, `disabled`, `readonly` - `min`, `max`, `step`: number - `label`, `error`, `help-text`: string - `hx-size`: sm | md | lg - `no-stepper`: boolean (hides +/- buttons) **Slots:** Default (label), `help`, `error`, `prefix`, `suffix` **CSS Parts:** `input`, `label`, `stepper`, `increment`, `decrement`, `help-text`, `error-message` **Events:** `hx-input`, `hx-change` (composed: true) ### Drupal Integration ```twig Dosage (mg) Enter prescribed dosage amount ``` ### ElementInternals: Full form participation ### Healthcare Use Cases - Medication dosage entry (mg, mL, units) - Patient vitals (weight, height, temperature) - Appointment duration, quantity fields ### Acceptance Criteria 1. Stepper buttons increment/decrement by step value 2. Respects min/max bounds, shows error when out of range 3. Keyboard: ArrowUp/Down to increment/decrement 4. ElementInternals form participation 5. Stepper buttons are hx-icon-button internally 6. Long-press on stepper for rapid increment
title: T1-07: hx-number-input — Numeric Input with Stepper

Stepper buttons are hx-icon-button internally 6. Long-press on stepper for rapid increment

threadFeedback.agentReasoning: This feedback was already fully addressed in iteration 1. The bot comment is stale and was filed against the pre-fix version of the file. Line 36 in the current file reads `color: var(--hx-number-input-label-color, var(--hx-color-neutral-700));` — no `#343a40` literal. No action needed.
